base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of papal_magnets_flags — a effect_layer from 1989 populous. Papal Magnet (deploys believers' leader) + flag markers for good + evil sides. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
